programmes.show_description: Teleshopping.
Jimmy and Shivi are joined by presenter Leah Charles-King to make pictures using the magic of the sun and a DIY upcycling challenge too.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Just 33 players remain as Rob Brydon hosts another thrilling edition of quick-fire quiz duels and we learn who will edge closer to victory and the 50,000-pound jackpot.
News, current affairs and lively debate.
Magazine show with news and topical items, celebrity guests, expert advice, real-life stories, competitions and a mix of cookery, health, beauty, lifestyle and more.
Hugh Woozencroft presents live EFL action from the Championship as promotion-chasing Middlesbrough and Millwall face each other at The Riverside.
The latest headlines from around the world at lunchtime with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents, all of which are followed by a national weather forecast.
The latest news and weather from around the North West.
The fast-paced game of words hosted by Adil Ray - playing against the reigning Lingo champions this time are sisters Carol and Joanie and couple Ailsa and Joe.
Stephen Mulhern is back with the exciting and iconic gameshow as another brave contestant takes on the infamous Banker for a chance of winning a life-changing cash prize.
Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which three players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning a cash jackpot.
The latest news and weather from around the North West.
National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world, plus a focus on the stories that matter to you.
Bradley Walsh hosts as Raj Bisram, Danielle Harold, John Conteh and Roger Black take on a Chaser to try to win thousands of pounds for their chosen charities.
Paddy spirals. Marlon has an idea. Marlon makes a discovery.
Maggie's slip of the tongue arouses Ben's suspicions, George nervously awaits the verdict in court, Jodie jumps to Bethany's defence, and Debbie's loved ones are optimistic ahead of her appeal.
A missing girl and a murdered student set Vera on an investigation that triggers memories from her own childhood.
ITV News provides a fresh perspective on the major stories of the day with national and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents.
Join Bruce Willis and his hapless heroes for another risky mission. The gang embark on a perilous journey to find a nuclear weapon - hotly pursued by deadly terrorists of course.
Teleshopping.
Alison has her work cut out with a giddy bulldog cross pup, a lively Frenchie needs to rest after a leg injury, and a Bernese mountain dog fears almost everything.
Alison meets a rare Romanian Mioritic Shepherd with a fear of stairs and doorways, and there is chaos when a van with seven Belgian Shepherd cross puppies arrives.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Chef Tom Kerridge is in Andalucia to discover the secrets behind sherry vinegar, a regional speciality, and trendy avocados before celebrating the ingredients.
Chef Tom Kerridge journeys across the heart of Spain to discover the secrets behind garlic and grapes before cooking up delicious dishes that celebrate them.
Adil Ray hosts the game of words as Good Morning Britain's Charlotte Hawkins and Sean Fletcher go head-to-head with Cold Feet legends Fay Ripley and John Thomson for charity.
Alan and the team create a garden celebrating all things textural for a hard-working support worker from Leicester, who looks after young single mothers.

programmes.show_name: Love Your Weekend with Alan Titchmarsh
programmes.show_description: Joining Alan at Manor Farm are Tessa Peake-Jones, Adam Garcia, and Phil Daniels as we visit a farm helping adults with disabilities and autism through nature.
National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world.
James celebrates the Easter weekend of 2026 with Patsy Kensit - who talks about a new series of Pilgrimage - chefs Ryan and Liam Simpson-Trotman and Lisa Goodwin-Allen, and forager Alysia Vasey.
Hillsborough: Raymond visits Hillsborough Castle and Gardens - the official royal residence in Northern Ireland - and learns about both of their histories.
Birmingham: James visits the capital of the balti - Birmingham - and meets acclaimed food critic, broadcaster and author Grace Dent as he takes to a narrow boat.
National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world.
Oli Bell presents coverage of live racing from Musselburgh and Haydock. The feature meeting of the day is the flat card at Musselburgh where the Queen's Cup is the highlight.
Bradley Walsh hosts as one Chaser is all that stands between Toby Anstis, Paula Radcliffe, Rav Wilding, Vanessa Feltz and thousands of pounds for their chosen charities.
National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world as well as the latest major sports results.
The latest news and weather from around the North West.
Aisling Bea, Chris Packham and Kate Lawler join Stephen Mulhern for Celebrity Catchphrase, hoping to ‘say what they see’ and guess well-known phrases for a chance to win £50,000 for their charity.
The auditions continue as further acts take to the stage with performances to impress the crowd and judges as they try to win themselves a coveted space in the semi-finals.
Celebs take on 'The Great Kitchen Cook Off’, a fake cookery-themed show hosted by Celebrity Chef Monica Galetti, who is totally in on the whole thing.
Find out how clever you are as Lee Mack presents the quiz where it doesn't matter how good you are at quizzes and where 100 contestants could win up to 100,000 pounds.
Jonathan's guests are BAFTA award-winning actress Dame Kristin Scott Thomas, QI regular Alan Davies, and comedians Katherine Ryan and Mawaan Rizwan, with music from Sienna Spiro.
National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world.
Giant reptile and giant gorilla thrash it out - with humanity caught in the balance. Don't miss the action-adventure sequel starring Alexander Skarsgård & Millie Bobby Brown.
